_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS.md (brain -> skills -> 14-param -> modules/canonical -> principles -> unit+browser tests -> verify)
_meta.scope: engine-wide — generalizes FR-UI-HARDENING-2026-0002 across all modules

title: Generalize detail panels: auto-derive read-only child sub-collections (panels + sub-routes) from canonical FKs
business_reason: FR-0002 hand-built one detail panel (onboarding documents). The audit found 23 parent pages own child tables. Generalize so every parent page shows its children in context — one engine change instead of 23 hand-built panels (P0.6).
brain_skills: Brain: a parent record must show its children in context, uniformly. Skills: 03 Screen Contract, 05 API Contract, 01 Spec Interpreter, 08 Security (masking).

param_14.question: Auto-generate read-only child detail panels + their sub-routes for every parent page.
param_14.answer: Shared derivation _validation/_detail_panels.py: for a parent table, find child tables OWNED BY THE SAME MODULE with an FK to the parent (skip the 'core' megamodule — its tables are peers, not sub-collections), derive subPath (common-prefix strip), listColumns (exclude id/fk/system/normalized/private-file), cap 4. gen_modules emits a GET sub-route per child (/api/<route>/[id]/<subPath> -> listChildRecords); gen_ui emits ModuleTable detailPanels[]. ModuleTable now supports multiple read-only panels (active-panel model; the singular detailPanel — CRM comms — still works as a 1-element list).
param_14.answer_source: CANONICAL_DATA_MODEL.json (owner_module + FK graph) + FR-0002 listChild helper
affected_modules: ALL staff modules with child tables (~23 pages, 47 sub-routes)
param_14.data_entities: reads child rows by FK (masked); no schema change
param_14.security_implications: every sub-route is staff-read guarded; rows masked; private file refs (kind=file / masking=private) excluded from listColumns; same-owner scoping avoids surfacing unrelated entities.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: one generator change regenerates 47 sub-routes + 23 pages; verification leans on tsc + the e2e suite. Write panels (upload/review children) remain a later slice.
param_14.assumptions: Read-only is sufficient now; 'core' peer entities intentionally excluded; cap 4 panels per page.

principles_pass.P0.6: one shared derivation + generator change; all parents benefit; ModuleTable multi-panel is reusable
principles_pass.P1.9/P2.10: child rows masked; private file refs not listed

verification: 47 child sub-routes + 23 pages with detailPanels generated; tsc clean; unit 147/147; journeys 05 (3 panels: Documents/Events/Status Controls + sub-route), 03/04 (onboarding), crm_list_ux (CRM singular-panel back-compat), 00 — all green; drift guardrail OK after commit.
supersedes_note: The hand-written onboarding documents sub-route from FR-0002 is now generated by gen_modules (same path); FR-0002's listChild kernel helper is reused by all 47 generated sub-routes.

known_followups.write_panels: add/upload + review (write) panels where the child has its own lifecycle (e.g. document review) — a later slice; today panels are read-only.
known_followups.core_relationships: the 'core' megamodule (schools/students/participations/…) is excluded from auto-panels (peers, not sub-collections) — curate specific cross-entity views separately if needed.
